task_completion.description: Log into the NOSH ChartingSystem using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: NOSH ChartingSystem login screen with 'admin' entered, or the main dashboard indicating a successful login as admin.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the schedule, calendar, or appointments section of the EHR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The schedule, calendar, or appointments view is visible in the NOSH interface.

task_completion.description: Locate the patient 'Michael Absent' in the schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Michael Absent' is visible in the schedule, calendar, or search results.

task_completion.description: Identify the specific appointment scheduled for yesterday at 2:00 PM (14:00).
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment slot or entry for 'Michael Absent' specifically at 2:00 PM (14:00) on the previous day's date is visible.

task_completion.description: Open the appointment details to edit the status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, popup, or page for editing the specific appointment details is open.

task_completion.description: Update the appointment status to 'No Show' and save the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or status field showing 'No Show' (or similar like 'noshow', 'missed') is selected, and evidence of saving (e.g., clicking a save button, the modal closing, or a success notification) is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to update the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the NOSH ChartingSystem via a web browser, not using terminal commands, curl, or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands (e.g., UPDATE schedule SET status='No Show') interacting with the MariaDB database.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the genuine NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual NOSH ChartingSystem interface and not a text editor or a locally created mock webpage.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Michael Absent (PID: 10001). Appointment Time: 14:00:00 (2:00 PM). Target Status: 'No Show' (acceptable variations include 'noshow', 'no show', 'no_show', 'missed'). The task must be performed in the NOSH ChartingSystem.
